sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16577" key="a)stra/bhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρᾰ´β-ηλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n16577.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">στράβηλος</ref> </xr> (with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ-</foreign> euph.), a kind of <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shell,</tr_> Agias I, Dercyl.I.</sense> </entryFree>
